headline: Pak Mail in Garland, Texas Welcomes New Owner--Former Customer Transitions from Industrial Technology Career
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in Garland, TX to new owner, David Somiari. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail location of nearly 30 years.

This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail location of nearly 30 years.

headline: New Ownership of AIM Mail Center in Huntington Beach, California Marks New Chapter for Longstanding Business, Led by Former Housing and Urban Development Professional
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing AIM Mail Center location in Huntington Beach, CA. With a background in real estate and Housing and Urban Development, the new owner brings a service-driven perspective that ensures the community will continue to benefit from the essential offerings of this nearly 30-year AIM Mail Center. The owner currently works as a Notary

headline: FedEx Earnings Due: A Milestone Report After Massive Transformation
summary: FedEx prepares to release earnings for its fiscal fourth quarter after Tuesday's market close, its first report after executing a momentous structural transformation.  FedEx stock dropped near a buy point, and rival UPS also lost grund.  The restructuring included spinning off FedEx Freight, its less-than-truckload business, earlier this month.

headline: FedEx Earnings Show Weaker Margin Amid Massive Transformation
summary: FedEx easily beat revenue estimates for its fiscal fourth quarter after Tuesday's market close, its first report after executing a momentous structural transformation.  The restructuring included spinning off FedEx Freight, its less-than-truckload business, earlier this month.  Late Tuesday, FedEx posted Q4 earnings of $6.31 per share, vs. $6.07 a year ago, on revenue of $25 billion.

content.title: FedEx Earnings Show Weaker Margin Amid Massive Transformation
content.summary: FedEx easily beat revenue estimates for its fiscal fourth quarter after Tuesday's market close, its first report after executing a momentous structural transformation.  The restructuring included spinning off FedEx Freight, its less-than-truckload business, earlier this month.  Late Tuesday, FedEx posted Q4 earnings of $6.31 per share, vs. $6.07 a year ago, on revenue of $25 billion.

headline: FedEx Earnings Beat Expectations. The Stock Is Falling Anyway.
summary: Shares of shipper  FedEx  fell after the company beat expectations for fourth quarter earnings and revenue and sees continued profit growth this year.  Shares fell 4.4% in after hours trading to $303.29.  FedEx reported fourth quarter revenue of $25 billion and adjusted earnings of $6.21 a share.

content.title: FedEx Earnings Beat Expectations. The Stock Is Falling Anyway.
content.summary: Shares of shipper  FedEx  fell after the company beat expectations for fourth quarter earnings and revenue and sees continued profit growth this year.  Shares fell 4.4% in after hours trading to $303.29.  FedEx reported fourth quarter revenue of $25 billion and adjusted earnings of $6.21 a share.

headline: FedEx’s (NYSE:FDX) Q2 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Parcel and cargo delivery company FedEx (NYSE:FDX) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 12.5% year on year to $25.01 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $6.31 per share was 6.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: FedEx’s (NYSE:FDX) Q2 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
content.summary: Parcel and cargo delivery company FedEx (NYSE:FDX) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 12.5% year on year to $25.01 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $6.31 per share was 6.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: FedEx tops Q4 earnings estimates, stock drops
summary: International courier service FedEx (FDX) topped fiscal fourth quarter estimates on adjusted earnings ($6.31 per share vs. expectations of $5.97). The stock is dropping in Tuesday's after-hours trading. Market Domination Overtime Anchor Josh Lipton takes a closer look at FedEx's earnings release.

content.title: FedEx tops Q4 earnings estimates, stock drops
content.description:
International courier service FedEx (FDX) topped fiscal fourth quarter estimates on adjusted earnings ($6.31 per share vs. expectations of $5.97). The stock is dropping in Tuesday's after-hours trading.

Market Domination Overtime Anchor Josh Lipton takes a closer look at FedEx's earnings release.

headline: FedEx Keeps Finding Ways to Unlock Value, McNally Says
summary: FedEx earnings for the fiscal fourth quarter topped Wall Street estimates and the courier is projecting that profit will grow this year. The results suggest cost-cutting efforts are working. Peter McNally of Third Bridge breaks down the earnings on "Bloomberg The Close."

content.title: FedEx Keeps Finding Ways to Unlock Value, McNally Says
content.description: FedEx earnings for the fiscal fourth quarter topped Wall Street estimates and the courier is projecting that profit will grow this year. The results suggest cost-cutting efforts are working. Peter McNally of Third Bridge breaks down the earnings on "Bloomberg The Close."
